description: Design router for UI/UX work — runs as workflow stage 2b (`/wf-design <slug>`), as a focused sub-command on an active workflow (`/wf-design <slug> <sub>`), or freestanding (`/wf-design <sub>`). 22 sub-commands span planning (shape, craft), inspection (extract), review (audit, critique), surface-level transformations (animate, bolder, clarify, colorize, delight, distill, harden, layout, onboard, optimize, overdrive, polish, quieter, typeset, adapt), and project context (setup, teach).
